response: Released in 2023, Christopher Nolan’s drama and history film Oppenheimer has an 180-minute runtime and a $100 million production budget, emerging as a massive commercial juggernaut that grossed $952 million at the global box office. The critically acclaimed title earned an 8.3 out of 10 rating on IMDB and a 93% fresh score on Rotten Tomatoes, capping its landmark run by taking home the Oscar for Best Picture.
